title: Genie One enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Additional chat audit logs in Genie One**: Nine new `genieChat` audit events are now available for granular tracking: `mcpToolInvocation`, `steerGenieChatConversation`, `updateGenieChatConversationFeedback`, `cancelGenieChatConversation`, `getGenieChatConversation`, and scheduled task operations (`createScheduledTask`, `getScheduledTask`, `updateScheduledTask`, `deleteScheduledTask`). See [Chat events in Genie One](/aws/en/admin/account-settings/audit-logs#genie-chat).
* **Chat input fix in Genie One**: Fixed a bug where text lingered in the chat input field after submission.
* **Simplified email text formatting for scheduled chat tasks in Genie One**: Email text formatting for scheduled tasks is now more viewer friendly.
